752 N2005_MDCTN_INTRVTN_IND N2005_MDCTN_INTRVTN_IND N2005 Medication Intervention Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates the facility contacted and completed physician (or physician-designee) prescribed/recommended actions by midnight of the next calendar day each time potential clinically significant medication issues were identified since
